name: Grand Junction (Low)

restrictions.text: Fire restrictions may be in place, for up to date info:

thresholds:
ERC > 86%, BI > 90%, Wind Speed > 10
Max Temp > 85, Min Rh < 15, 1000hr Fuels < 12, Max RH < 45
If three or more of the seven thresholds are met, consider it a watchout.
raws:
The Low Elevation Fire Danger Rating Area uses the following Remote Automated Weather Stations (RAWS) which are equally weighted in value, using Fuel Model X (Brush) incorporating data years 2005-2024 are:  
52407: Pine Ridge, 52410: Little Dolores, 51504: Rifle, 51507: Demaree
